transactions.desc: The Dodgers activated Betts (oblique) from the 10-day injured list Monday.
The Orioles selected Walker's contract from Triple-A Norfolk on Monday.
The Giants optioned Smith to Triple-A Sacramento on Monday, Alex Pavlovic of NBC Sports Bay Area reports.
The Giants optioned Porter to Triple-A Sacramento on Monday, Alex Pavlovic of NBC Sports Bay Area reports.
The Orioles optioned Gibson to Triple-A Norfolk on Monday.
The Giants recalled Beck from Triple-A Sacramento on Monday, Alex Pavlovic of NBC Sports Bay Area reports.
The Giants activated Bader (hamstring) from the 10-day injured list Monday, Alex Pavlovic of NBC Sports Bay Area reports.
The Mariners recalled Gonzalez from Triple-A Tacoma on Monday.
The Blue Jays recalled Pinango from Triple-A Buffalo on Monday.
The Blue Jays selected Rodriguez's contract from Triple-A Buffalo on Monday.
The Blue Jays designated Lauer for assignment Monday.
The Dodgers optioned Freeland to Triple-A Oklahoma City on Monday, Fabian Ardaya of The Athletic reports.
Triple-A Salt Lake activated Moore (leg) from the 7-day injured list Monday.
Atlanta activated Kim (finger) from the 10-day injured list Monday.
The Cardinals promoted Rodriguez from High-A Peoria to Double-A Springfield on Monday, Rob Rains of StLSportsPage.com reports.
The Pirates promoted Hernandez from Single-A Bradenton to High-A Greensboro on Sunday, Colin Beazley of the Pittsburgh Post-Gazette reports.
Encarnacion elected free agency Sunday, Alex Pavlovic of NBC Sports Bay Area reports.
The Tigers selected Workman's contract from Triple-A Toledo on Sunday.
The Mets outrighted Wagaman to Triple-A Syracuse on Sunday.
The Mets reinstated Gerber (finger) from the 15-day injured list and optioned him to Triple-A Syracuse on Sunday.
The Dodgers selected Mills' contract from Triple-A Oklahoma City on Sunday.
The Dodgers optioned Gervase to Triple-A Oklahoma City on Sunday.
The Orioles claimed Roa off waivers from the Twins on Sunday and optioned him to Triple-A Norfolk, Jake Rill of MLB.com reports.
The Phillies claimed Rutledge off waivers and optioned him to Triple-A Lehigh Valley on Sunday.
The Giants optioned Santos to Triple-A Sacramento on Sunday.
The Giants recalled Smith from Triple-A Sacramento on Sunday.
The Giants reinstated Hentges (knee/shoulder) from the 15-day injured list Sunday.
The Giants optioned Walker to Triple-A Sacramento on Sunday, Alex Pavlovic of NBC Sports Bay Area reports.
The Twins recalled Rojas from Triple-A St. Paul on Sunday.
The Twins optioned Funderburk to Triple-A St. Paul on Sunday.
